source_meaning: Directory for deciphered oracle-bone character image classes
import_action: Use to seed deciphered character-class import after raw package size and rights review
rights_boundary: Do not commit raw images; import class metadata and source-marked derived indexes first

source_meaning: Directory for undeciphered oracle-bone character image classes
import_action: Use to seed undeciphered character-class import after raw package size and rights review
rights_boundary: Do not treat dataset class IDs as philological conclusions

source_meaning: Mapping from modern Chinese character to dataset category ID
import_action: Use as auxiliary mapping only after cross-checking against stronger character dictionaries
rights_boundary: Modern character mapping is not a final oracle-bone decipherment authority

source_meaning: Mapping from dataset category ID to modern Chinese character
import_action: Use as auxiliary mapping for candidate character records
rights_boundary: Modern character mapping is not a final oracle-bone decipherment authority

source_meaning: Dataset source prefixes for character-image provenance
import_action: Map X/L/Y/H to professional sources where possible and keep G as source_under_review
rights_boundary: GuoXueDaShi-derived material must not become primary authority

source_meaning: Path to facsimile image
import_action: Register facsimile image paths as asset references before raw image import
rights_boundary: Raw image files stay in large-source workflow

source_meaning: Path to rubbing image
import_action: Register rubbing image paths as asset references before raw image import
rights_boundary: Raw image files stay in large-source workflow

source_meaning: Short rubbing identifier
import_action: Use as a candidate inscription or image-set reference pending source crosswalk
rights_boundary: Identifier semantics require source review before becoming canonical

source_meaning: Sentence or group type within an inscription
import_action: Import as sentence/group metadata for context reconstruction
rights_boundary: Dataset grouping is useful but still needs philological review

source_meaning: Bounding box x y width height for an annotated character
import_action: Import as character occurrence geometry linked to rubbing/facsimile image reference
rights_boundary: Geometry depends on source image and should not be detached from provenance

source_meaning: Character order in sentence
import_action: Use to seed reading-order and grammar-position analysis
rights_boundary: Order remains dataset annotation and should be reviewed against transcription

source_meaning: Main character label
import_action: Map to project character IDs only after external source review
rights_boundary: Dataset label is not a universal character ID

source_meaning: Secondary or sub-character label
import_action: Use for variant/sub-character hierarchy after source review
rights_boundary: Sub-character hierarchy is dataset-specific until cross-checked

source_meaning: Placeholder indicator and special marker fields
import_action: Import as occurrence-level annotation flags
rights_boundary: Marker semantics require dataset documentation and manual review

source_field_or_unit: OBC; BI; SS; SAC; WSC; CS
source_meaning: Six historical script stages used by EVOBC
import_action: Use to design evolution-chain records from oracle bone through later scripts
rights_boundary: Raw images and source websites need separate review before import

source_meaning: Reported EVOBC scale
import_action: Record as dataset-level statistic and not as imported corpus count
rights_boundary: Do not claim local corpus contains these images until package is imported

source_field_or_unit: 卜辞浏览; 释文检索; 原文检索; 甲骨字典
source_meaning: Professional database search and browsing entry points
import_action: Use to plan manual/API-like discovery workflow and source prefix mapping
rights_boundary: Commercial platform content requires access and redistribution caution

source_field_or_unit: 合集 H; 中国国家博物馆 GB; 史语所 SG; other abbreviations
source_meaning: Dropdown catalog abbreviations for oracle-bone source lookup
import_action: Register useful abbreviations when a concrete record is imported
rights_boundary: Do not bulk copy catalog records without access and rights review

source_meaning: Hopkins list cross-reference keys for Yingguo; CUL; Chalfant; Heji
import_action: Use to build inscription-level crosswalk records and Heji links
rights_boundary: Finding list metadata only; images and 3D assets need separate rights review

source_meaning: Collection-level period/topic distribution table
import_action: Use as collection-level summary and not as character-level evidence
rights_boundary: Table values need explicit source citation if extracted later

source_meaning: Official collection scale statement
import_action: Record as collection-level provenance statistic
rights_boundary: Overview page only; not a full searchable corpus endpoint

source_field_or_unit: Hu Houxuan; Yu Shengwu; Chen Mengjia
source_meaning: Named provenance chain in the library overview
import_action: Use as institutional collection provenance note
rights_boundary: Requires object-level records for item-specific claims

source_meaning: Reported graph-based evolution dataset scale
import_action: Use to plan graph/evolution import after package review
rights_boundary: Not a primary paleographic source by itself

source_meaning: Oracle character number search field
import_action: Use as the first external character-head reference when importing Xiaoxuetang records
rights_boundary: Character number is source-local and must not replace project ID

source_meaning: Glyph-form search field
import_action: Use for glyph-form lookup and later variant grouping
rights_boundary: Raw glyph images require separate rights review before asset import

source_meaning: Jiaguwen Bian page search field
import_action: Use for dictionary-page cross-reference during character import
rights_boundary: Page reference is not a universal character ID

source_meaning: Heji number search field from character database
import_action: Use to connect character heads to Heji plate/provenance review
rights_boundary: Heji plate numbers are inscription/object references and need OBM cross-check

source_meaning: Older catalog reference search field
import_action: Use to preserve older catalog links from character records
rights_boundary: Old catalog abbreviations need source-prefix review before formal import

source_meaning: Classification group search field
import_action: Use as source-local class grouping for candidate review
rights_boundary: Class group is not a project taxonomy until reviewed

source_meaning: Heji plate/material-source number
import_action: Use as primary OBM inscription/provenance lookup field
rights_boundary: Heji number identifies a plate/material source and not a single character

source_meaning: Original old-catalog reference
import_action: Use to preserve original publication/rubbing reference chains
rights_boundary: Abbreviations must be expanded through OBM appendices before public display

source_meaning: Original object/rubbing holding abbreviation
import_action: Use to connect Heji records to collection or rubbing-holding provenance
rights_boundary: Holding abbreviations require appendices and institution-level cross-checking

source_meaning: OBM note field
import_action: Use to preserve corrections and supplemental notes during Heji import
rights_boundary: Notes may record errors or supplements and must not be dropped

source_meaning: Link key between IHP rubbings and archaeological artifacts/images
import_action: Use to join rubbing records with artifact and image provenance
rights_boundary: Raw image reuse follows IHP site policy and membership/access rules

source_meaning: OBM old catalog book abbreviation appendix
import_action: Use to expand and normalize OBM 舊著錄 references before source crosswalk import
rights_boundary: Browser-reviewed metadata only; scripted download is access-restricted and row-level claims need OBM citation

source_meaning: OBM rubbing and holding abbreviation appendix
import_action: Use to expand and normalize OBM 原骨拓藏 references before collection provenance import
rights_boundary: Browser-reviewed metadata only; institution labels still need object-level verification

source_meaning: HUST validation class to OCR label candidate crosswalk
import_action: Use as a searchable dataset-label bridge for 1588 HUST candidate classes before cross-source review
rights_boundary: OCR label candidates are dataset metadata and must not become accepted readings by themselves

source_meaning: HUST source-category label staging
import_action: Use to preserve the 0001-1781 HUST source-category range before formal obs-char assignment
rights_boundary: Source categories are dataset references and must not be treated as formal project character IDs

source_meaning: National Library of China holding number such as 北图 19780
import_action: Use as NLC-local object or inscription reference when item records become accessible
rights_boundary: NLC holding number is a local collection identifier and must not replace project IDs

source_meaning: Original collector/source number or older collection reference
import_action: Use to preserve NLC source-chain and older collection references
rights_boundary: NLC source references need row-level citation before object-level claims

source_field_or_unit: 贞人;时期;出土地点;原骨属性;卜辞内容类别
source_meaning: NLC database design fields for dating context and topical classification
import_action: Use as target field contract for future NLC inscription-context import
rights_boundary: Field design evidence is not a downloaded item-level record set

source_meaning: NLC bibliographic/catalog references including Heji and Yinqi Cuibian
import_action: Use to cross-check NLC records against published catalog references before promotion
